description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service and defines the variable CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME, with three global before_script commands: mkdir -p ~/.docker/ && echo "$DOCKER_AUTH" > ~/.docker/config.json, docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY, and tf_version=$(grep TERRAFORM_VERSION= Dockerfile | cut -d= -f2). Add a build job in the build stage that runs the before_script then executes docker build --pull -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE . and docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE. Add a validate job in the test stage that also runs the before_script and then runs docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE followed by docker run $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE terraform --version. Add a release-image job in the release stage that is limited to the master branch and must be triggered manually; it runs the before_script, pulls $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, tags it as karisch/terraform:${tf_version} and karisch/terraform:latest, and pushes both tags to the registry.
